top.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon but partial truce with Hezbollah appears to hold
top.summary: Israel continues its campaign in the south, though has not struck Beirut after a deal announced by the US.

top.title: US and Iran launch new strikes as ceasefire negotiations stalled
top.summary: US launches fresh strikes on Iran and an oil tanker as Tehran says it attacked US bases in the Gulf.

top.title: Putin remains uncompromising on Ukraine, but is public discourse on war changing in Russia?
top.summary: Russia is intensifying attacks in Ukraine but more than four years of war are causing concern even among Putin loyalists.

top.title: Publishers in UK can opt out of Google AI search results
top.summary: The Competition and Markets Authority says it would put publishers "in a stronger position to negotiate content deals with Google".

top.title: Do you find yourself aimlessly scrolling? You're not alone
top.summary: A Virgin Media O2 report suggests an average of 36% of time spent on phones is without a clear purpose.

top.title: Microsoft testing wearable AI gadget aimed at office workers
top.summary: The company said its own workers are testing a "wearable access badge" and a desktop device.
